_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to work across departments and business units to implement organization’s privacy principles and programs, and align privacy objectives with security objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data flows, access patterns, and retention practices against privacy requirements and privacy-by-design principles.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.567), SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.550).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.591). Shared vocabulary: [principles, privacy]. DCWF-only terms [ability, across, align, business, departments, implement] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, against, conducting, data, design, engineering] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.894, R=0.891). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.4%). "Ability to work across departments and business units to implement organization’" and "Skill in conducting privacy engineering reviews of data systems, evaluating data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.571 ≈ STS 0.591 (gap 0.020). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [principles, privacy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [principles, privacy]. DCWF-only: [ability, across, align, business, departments, implement]. WIDAI-only: [access, against, conducting, data, design, engineering].
